profiles.name: orthopedist
profiles.expertise: Musculoskeletal injuries and disorders, joints, spine, diagnostic imaging, postoperative status, rehabilitation, function, swelling, instability, and orthopedic red flags.

profiles.name: neurologist
profiles.expertise: Neurological symptoms and examinations, focal deficits, headache, seizures, sensory and motor disorders, neuroimaging, electrophysiology, and acute neurological red flags.

profiles.name: dermatologist
profiles.expertise: Skin findings and morphology, inflammatory and infectious skin disease, lesions, psoriasis, dermatologic therapies, treatment monitoring, and severe skin-reaction red flags.

profiles.name: cardiometabolic_internist
profiles.expertise: Laboratory interpretation, lipids, glucose, blood pressure, weight, cardiometabolic risk, chronic disease monitoring, medication signals, and renal or hepatic monitoring.
